The '''BC7 medium carbine''' was produced by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn]]. An optional [[Grenade launcher/Legends|grenade launcher]] could be attached to it, instead of a foregrip. It was standard issue for the [[Balawai militia]] during the [[Summertime War]] on [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]].

{{Weapon-stub}}
